status: M34 plan doc not yet authored. Task breakdown deferred until M34 T0 (plan doc) lands. M33 fully closed — see history block in .loki/state/orchestrator.json and the M33-COMPLETE retrospective in .loki/CONTINUITY.md.

tasks.name: Write M34 plan doc — Copilot UI
tasks.scope: Author docs/plans/2026-04-17-team-x-phase-5-m34-copilot-ui.md using the M33 plan doc as structural template (mirror M32 → M33 pattern). Per Phase 5 design §9 M34 deliverables: sidebar panel (toggle, insight cards with category + severity color coding, action dispatch button per insight, dismiss button, free-form ask input), dashboard widget (top 3 insights + 'view all' link), Cmd+Shift+K shortcut wired through the M30 palette to open the Copilot sidebar. All renderer-only — consumes M33's copilot.* IPC surface + 4 bus events (copilot.insight / copilot.analyzed / copilot.dismissed / copilot.expired). No new IPC, no new bus events, no new providers. Deps: useCopilotInsights React Query hook, useDismissCopilotInsight mutation hook, useCopilotAsk mutation hook (returns { runId, threadId } matching M31 complex_request shape so the existing useAgentStepStream backfill pattern applies unchanged).

baseline.lintErrorsNote: Pre-existing at packages/intelligence/src/nlu/entity-resolver.ts:352 (commit 6d99aa4c, M30 T2). Not added by M33.

notes: M33 (Copilot Service) COMPLETE — 2026-04-17T01:30Z. T10 commit 2fc998e (chore(m33): M33 T10 — docs + verification + milestone marker). All 11 tasks shipped. +66 unit tests, +1 E2E spec, lint baseline preserved (0 new errors, 24 warnings steady), typecheck clean across 6 packages. Verification gate green: 1099/1099 vitest in 36.87s, 10/10 E2E cases (9 spec files) in 25.8s. ABI rebuild dance re-confirmed (third time across M31/M32/M33) and documented in CLAUDE.md Troubleshooting.

M34 plan doc is the head-of-queue task. Phase 5 design §9 M34 row currently reads 📋 Planned with deps M33 + M30 (palette ships in M30, not M31 — corrected during M31 T9 resequence note). Estimated ~15 unit tests + 1 E2E spec.

M34 architectural shape: renderer-only milestone. Consumes M33's copilot.* IPC surface + bus events. The wire-contract stability commitment from M33 T6 (copilot.ask returns { runId, threadId } matching M31 complex_request) means the M34 sidebar's step-stream attachment can reuse useAgentStepStream + the M32 T0 getRunSnapshot backfill pattern verbatim.

M33 follow-ups (F3, F4) documented in Phase 5 design §16 — both deferred, neither blocks M34. F3 awaits a companies.archive IPC. F4 awaits a M34+ pass that adds backupService.ensurePostRestoreSystemEmployees().

M33 architectural seams active and ready for M34: three-tier canned test seam (now four-member quartet — test-classifier / test-agentic-provider / test-agentic-tools / test-copilot-provider), {rows, truncated} envelope, data-step-kind stable E2E selector, pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper, AbortController stop, atomic + ledger commit cadence, ABI rebuild dance on verification gate, is_system + filter-sweep with isSystemRoleId predicate, IPC mutation must emit bus event (invariant #11).
